title: psychotria ilheosana
intro: Psychotria ilheosana is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Atlantic Forest of Brazil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria ilheosana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in various herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
